devdoc.details: Interface for ERC20 standard token interactions.
A simple liquidity pool contract for execution of token swaps and liquidity management.

depositLiquidity(address,uint256).details: Allows the owner to inject liquidity into the pool via backend transferFrom. Use this method to bypass native testnet token direct transfer restrictions.

executeSwap(address,address,uint256,uint.details: Executes a peer-to-contract swap between two ERC20 tokens.

withdrawToken(address,uint256).details: Allows the contract owner to safely withdraw pool funds.
